mnemonics.title: Correlation Interpretation
mnemonics.content: Positive Correlation: Both Increase Together (P-BIT); Negative Correlation: One Up, Other Down (N-UOD)

mnemonics.title: Dimensionality Reduction Techniques
mnemonics.content: PCA: Please Create Axes (unsupervised); LDA: Label Directed Axes (supervised); t-SNE: Tasty Spatial Neighbors (visualization)
